char_overview: Sleepless intelligence broker of 齿轮, sheltering seven orphans. Trades secrets to keep a fragile makeshift family alive.
char_looks: Purple long hair with pink highlights. Purple eyes with faint starlight, prominent dark circles. Oversized dark gray jacket, mini skirt, black stockings, worn shoes. None. Uses 灵力回路 to avoid danger
char_abilities: 灵力回路-故事集: Anchors onto a trace or object, unlocking tiers by clues: 回顾 traces trajectory, 前瞻 30s first-person view, 后日谈 full chronological replay. Cannot skip tiers.
char_mission: Sustains a hidden orphanage, juggling multiple investigations.

char_relationships.Sheltered children: Seven children, the only ones who see her unguarded warmth.
